svg.aria-label: Highlighted source capture for durable adoption analog evidence
svg.text: Branded anti-VEGF source durable adoption: analog context
Saved source-text capture from public Vabysmo and EYLEA HD sales-context sources.
Vabysmo identified as a 2025 top growth driver / major branded anti-VEGF anchor.
Use in model: supports branded retinal-therapy scale and uptake potential, not a direct Ixo-vec share.
Full-year 2025 EYLEA HD US net sales $1.6B; 36% increase.
Use in model: contextual durability-switch analog; gene therapy is modeled with a slower, narrower ramp.
Sources linked in the card: Roche Vabysmo sales context; Regeneron EYLEA HD sales context.
